title: octoknema orientalis
intro: Octoknema orientalis is a plant species, also known as the 'tropical octoknema', which belongs to the family Olacaceae. It is primarily found in tropical regions and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimalarial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The extracts from this plant have been found to exhibit various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in herbal remedies in the form of tinctures and ointments.
